subcodes.first_line: O My Name, the All-Forgiving! Through thee have I been tried, and through thee have I drunk what none hath drunk, and tasted what no soul hath tasted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا اسمی الغفار بک ابتلیت و بک شربت ما لا شرب احد و ذقت ما لا ذاقه نفس لو
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @justice and wrath of God
